title: zanthoxylum ciliatum subsp. purpursii
intro: Zanthoxylum ciliatum subsp. purpursii, also known as the purple-toothed zanthoxylum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Zanthoxylum, which is commonly found in Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum ciliatum subsp. purpursii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used as a decoction or infusion to treat various ailments, and it can also be used as a spice or seasoning in traditional Asian cuisine.
